task:
Find ALL files in ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/ that import from plan-panel.ts. For each file found:

1. Report the import statement (what's imported from plan-panel)
2. Report which proxy functions are called
3. Report how many times each proxy function is called across the codebase

Also search include all subdirectories. Use grep to search for imports and function usage.

Additionally, check if plan-panel.test.ts exists and read its first 50 lines to understand test structure.
